data.title: ARK Invest Files for ETF Tracking CoinDesk Crypto 20 Index
data.description: ARK Invest has filed an application with U.S. regulators to launch an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that will track the CoinDesk Crypto 20 index. According to NS3.AI, this development highlights ARK's increasing engagement in cryptocurrency investment products. The filing was initially reported by Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas.

data.title: Crypto Markets Anticipate Stability Amid Geopolitical Easing
data.description: The easing of geopolitical tensions is anticipated to bring stability to the cryptocurrency markets over the weekend. According to NS3.AI, Tezos may experience volatility due to its forthcoming protocol upgrade. Meanwhile, Seeker has seen a notable rally but is at risk of a downturn following a correction. Canton is demonstrating bullish momentum and could potentially break out if it surpasses critical resistance levels.

data.title: Two Women Convicted in CARES Act Fraud Scheme
data.description: Two women from New Jersey and West Virginia have been found guilty of orchestrating a bank fraud and money laundering scheme amounting to $145,625, linked to the US government's CARES Act. According to NS3.AI, they falsified a Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) loan application by providing false employment and income information to fraudulently secure $15,625. The recipient of the loan then transferred the funds through digital wallets, disguising transaction details to hide the illegal proceeds.

data.title: Crypto Market Sees Significant Liquidations in 24 Hours
data.description:
On January 24, data from Coinglass revealed substantial liquidations in the cryptocurrency market. According to BlockBeats, the past hour alone saw liquidations totaling $149 million, with long positions accounting for $2.74 million and short positions for $146 million.

Over the last 24 hours, a total of 105,156 traders experienced liquidations, amounting to $303 million globally. The largest single liquidation occurred on Hyperliquid's ETH-USD pair, valued at $30.38 million.

data.title: American consumer confidence climbs as index beats forecasts and reaches five‑month peak
data.description:
American consumer confidence rose sharply in January, reaching its highest level in five months as people felt better about the economy and their own money situation. The University of Michigan’s final sentiment index climbed to 56. 4, up 3. 5 points from December. The reading came in above the early estimate and beat every forecast in a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/american-consumer-confidence-climbs/

data.title: USD/JPY Reaches Lowest Level Since January
data.description: The USD/JPY exchange rate has fallen to 157, marking its lowest point since January 9. According to ChainCatcher, the currency pair experienced a daily decline of 0.86%.

data.title: BitGo's Market Debut Faces Challenges with Share Price Decline
data.description: BitGo, a cryptocurrency custody firm, recently went public with a valuation of around $2 billion. According to NS3.AI, the company's shares experienced a 12% decline on the second day of trading, dropping significantly below the initial public offering (IPO) price. This decrease has sparked concerns regarding investor confidence following the company's IPO debut.
